  "findings": [
    "Failure to perform the try-step verification (SEQ) to confirm zero energy state before beginning work."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all work on the equipment.",
    "Perform the try-step verification by attempting to start or cycle the equipment using local controls to verify isolation.",
    "Ensure zero energy state is verified before resuming any service or maintenance work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Lockout/Tagout is non-compliant and highly dangerous without the verification step (try-step). Under OSHA 1910.147(d)(6), the authorized employee must verify that isolation and de-energization of the machine or equipment have been accomplished before starting work.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(6)"
  ]
